subject: Add OneSignal SDK loading state tracking and separate subscription flow
body:
Changes:
- Add SDK loading state tracking in onesignal.ts (idle/loading/ready/error)
- Add visual SDK status indicator in NotificationBanner (colored dot + status text)
- Separate permission request from subscription on web platforms
- Add explicit subscribe() function for OneSignal opt-in
- Add isSubscribed state tracking separate from permission status
- Show two-step flow on web: 1) Enable permissions 2) Subscribe to notifications
- Add loading spinners for both permission and subscription buttons
- Disable buttons appropriately based on SDK state

This addresses potential SDK loading issues by:
- Providing visual feedback about OneSignal SDK initialization
- Preventing actions before SDK is ready
- Clearly separating browser permission from OneSignal subscription
- Showing helpful error messages if SDK fails to load
